FAQ

Frequently asked questions.

View FAQ

FAQ

What is AileCo?

AileCo is a mobile application for SmartChain product tracking and digital business card (V-Card) management.

I forgot my password, what should I do?

Click 'Forgot Password' on the login screen. A password reset link will be sent to your email.

How do I scan QR codes?

Tap the camera icon in the app and scan the QR code on the SmartChain product.

How do I create a V-Card?

Go to your profile, click the 'V-Card' tab and use 'Add New Card' option.

How do I update the app?

You can enable auto-updates from App Store or Google Play Store, or update manually.
